intelligence.target_persona: Vehicle owners seeking premium, reliable, and advanced detailing services to maintain and enhance their car or truck aesthetics.

hero.headline: Revitalize Your Ride with Premium Detailing
hero.subtext: Expert auto and truck detailing using the latest space-age products for flawless results.

image.alt: Professional auto detailing with advanced tools
image.image_search_query: premium auto detailing advanced tools closeup

about.story_text: Schlushed has been the trusted name in auto and truck detailing since 1999. Located at Rt 313 and Main St in Doylestown, PA, we pride ourselves on using only the highest quality space-age products to deliver impeccable results for your vehicle.
about.founder_note: Our passion is to help you maintain and enhance your vehicle’s appearance with premium care and expert attention.

features.title: Advanced Space-Age Products
features.description: We use cutting-edge, high-performance products that protect and enhance your vehicle’s finish.

features.title: Detailing for Autos & Trucks
features.description: Specialized services designed to meet the unique needs of both cars and trucks.

features.title: Experienced Since 1999
features.description: Over two decades of delivering consistent and reliable premium detailing services.

features.title: Convenient Doylestown Location
features.description: Easy access at Rt 313 and Main St ensures a hassle-free experience for local customers.

items.title: Detailer Applying Wax

items.caption: Precise wax application for protection

contact.headline: Contact Schlushed Today
contact.subheadline: Schedule your premium auto or truck detailing with our expert team.
